parsed.summary: This commit renames an npm scope and adds an interactive menu to a setup command for a Claude plugin. The changes are confined to metadata, documentation, and a markdown-based command file. No executable logic, auth boundaries, data mutations, or runtime code paths are modified. No material ship-blocking risks identified.
next_steps: Verify that the npm scope rename from the old scope to the new one doesn't break existing users who have the package installed under the old name - ensure deprecation notices or migration docs exist if needed.
Confirm the interactive menu in commands/setup.md handles the 'already configured' state gracefully for users who may have partial or corrupted configuration.
Validate that marketplace.json and plugin.json references are consistent with the new scope name across any deployment or publishing pipelines.
